profiles.description: Load a cartridge, parse its manifest and root flow, execute standard runtime nodes, and produce run metadata.
Run cartridges in a development test bench with events, diagnostics, and artifacts.
Create, edit, validate, and preview development cartridges.
Run packaged cartridges from a user-facing shelf or launcher.
Run production-ready cartridges without development-only authoring tools.
Run protocol-aware flows with runtime inputs, retrieval processes, decision processes, and tool-plan-mediated tool execution.
Run protocol-aware AI decision nodes with decision_envelope.v1 output, explicit user-input pauses, LLM test modes, and declared resume semantics.
Discover, validate, activate, isolate, sandbox, deactivate, and uninstall cartridge-owned portable DLC packages without leaking domain behavior into the base.
